description: Composition Black training shorts for men made of 87% polyester, 13% spandex Dri-Fit fabric, has an elasticated waistband with a drawstring, two insert pockets on the front, mesh panels along the crotch area, stitch detailing and swoosh logo in a reflective material towards the left hemline Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash warm with like colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry on low Cool iron; do not iron on decorations Built for breathable comfort and with the zero-distraction fit that athletes demand, this pair of nike training shorts comes in a simple design. These high-performance shorts created from Dri-Fit fabric wick sweat away from the body and keeps you cool, dry and comfortable. Team them with tees and sports shoes.
